description: Perform a maintenance audit on the Bridge Command scenario library at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/ by validating ship models against the Models directory. For any scenario where the ownship.ini ShipName is missing from the Models directory, move the entire scenario directory to /home/ga/Quarantine/. In othership.ini files, replace missing Type(N) models with 'Tug' if the name contains 'Tug', 'Ferry' if it contains 'Ferry', or 'Coaster' otherwise. Ensure all remaining scenarios contain a description.txt file with the text 'Legacy scenario restored by automated audit.' if one is not already present. Generate a report of all actions taken at /home/ga/Documents/audit_report.txt.
